## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss and refine the content generation process for Biologica's blog, focusing on article structure, SEO, and fact-checking workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Article structure with key takeaways at the top is preferred for UX, but SEO impact is minimal](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Custom fact-checking workflows implemented, including medical expert review and Biologica-specific mentions](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Future considerations: automated internal linking, audience-specific content pipelines, and incorporating feedback for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Topics

### Article Structure and SEO Considerations

  - [Current structure: key takeaways, intro section, subsequent content](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [SEO impact of takeaways placement is minimal; primary keywords included for search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [UX perspective favors takeaways first; Jakub to research industry standards](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Importance of visual breaks: pull quotes, bullet lists, tables for comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Embedding capabilities needed for social media content (YouTube, Instagram, Pinterest)](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Images and graphs crucial for engagement and explaining complex topics](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Content Generation Workflow Enhancements

  - [Updated Atlas with customized article generation process](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [New steps: enhanced article outline, generate article draft, multiple fact-checkers](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Expert article review impersonates medical expert, provides scientific accuracy checks](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Biologica mentions review ensures accurate and organic product integration](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Medical claims annotation adds MD tags to claims (40-50 tags in ingredient-based articles)](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Internal linking step to be implemented once website is live](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

### Fact-Checking and Feedback Integration

  - [Two-pronged approach to incorporate feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
    1.  Update writing guidelines for product messaging
    2.  Collect medical claims issues for developer to enhance fact-checker knowledge base
  - [Collaboration with Pedro (developer) to refine the expert review process](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Expectation: medical reviews will become less intense as knowledge base grows](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

### Future Content Considerations

  - [Potential for audience-specific content pipelines (e.g., pregnant women vs. postmenopausal)](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Different writing styles for various life stages and bylined authors](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Possibility of creating separate workflows for different writer personas (e.g., OBGYN vs. naturopathic doctor)](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Balancing content variety while maintaining consistency across articles](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)

### Website Development and Content Review Process

  - [Biologica team simultaneously building website, requiring significant copy](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Current review process working well, with quick turnarounds](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Monitoring team capacity for potential adjustments to content generation pace](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to research content ordering in healthcare/wellness space for best practices](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Brian to confirm with development team about implementing design elements (tables, pull quotes, embeds)](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Aida to update writing guidelines and collect medical claim issues for fact-checker improvement](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Explore options for automating internal linking process for initial content batch](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Consider developing audience-specific content pipelines as product range expands](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Monitor content review process efficiency and adjust pace if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/NW2wB8qR8sigERHWantWVMJweXA_s7Re?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
